headline: Realty Income to Present at Nareit's REITweek: 2026 Investor Conference
summary: Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced that Sumit Roy, Realty Income's President and Chief Executive Officer, will participate in a moderated company presentation at Nareit's REITweek: 2026 Investor Conference on Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 10:15 a.m. EDT/ 7:15 a.m. PDT.

headline: Jim Cramer: This Real Estate Stock Is 'Going To Go Higher'
summary: Realty Income may go higher, supported by better-than-expected earnings. Cramer also weighs in on Bentley Systems and Pool Corp.

headline: Realty Income: The Market Is Mispricing The New Trajectory
summary: Realty Income (O) rated Strong Buy after a Q1 double beat and Apollo JV/Core Plus Fund moves that cut dilution and boost flexibility.

headline: U.S. REIT At-The-Market Activity Dips In Q1 2026
summary: Thirty-three US REITs utilized their at-the-market (ATM) offering programs during the recent quarter, raising $4.15 billion in aggregate proceeds
